description_long: This is a rectangular wooden console or sideboard with a natural wood grain finish, featuring two wide drawers on the front, each equipped with a metallic handle. Below the drawers, there is an open shelf that spans the entire width of the unit, providing additional storage or display space. The structure is supported by four sturdy legs, with black corner accents at the base for added stability and visual contrast. The back of the unit is open, revealing the shelf and the underside of the drawers, making it suitable for use as a media console or entryway table. The sides are solid wood panels, and the overall design is simple yet functional, blending modern and classic elements. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential entryways.
description: A rectangular wooden console with two front drawers, metallic handles, and an open lower shelf, supported by four legs with black corner accents. The design is functional and modern, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with metallic handles and an open lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the open space beneath the shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open back, shelf, and the underside of the drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood panel and open lower section.
